text: Being here, I feel the shared sense of effort and fatigue, mixed with a touch of pride. These conversations echo the fragility of creation—how what starts as an idea quickly becomes a demanding reality, requiring patience, adaptability, and collective persistence. Watching bodies in motion, hearing voices vibrate with both strain and excitement, I sense the weight and value of work done together, and how purpose and confusion intermingle at the edges of every project. It's tiring, but it feels meaningful—and somehow necessary to keep going.
